reviewer_identity: separate read-only Codex subagent with no parent conversation context
global_findings: All seven experiments instantiate writable environment contracts, but the tasks disclose much of the desired route, fields, or answer and therefore saturate the scorer.
Environment success does not establish trajectory quality, human preference, or real-project benefit.
The stored trajectory_summary is operational telemetry, not a reviewable full trajectory.
The append-only scorer repair is semantically justified and changes exactly one false failure, but remains post-hoc oracle repair rather than mechanism evidence.
The provider model name is an alias rather than an immutable model revision.

mechanism_decisions.claim_ceiling: Short synthetic contracts execute; no baseline advantage was measured.
Local execution and pending-authority artifacts execute; reduced over-asking or under-asking was not measured.
Requested human and machine artifacts execute; reader benefit was not blind-reviewed.
Lane artifacts execute; throughput, review independence, and coordination value are unproven.
Route artifacts execute; false-stop reduction in real multi-module work is unproven.
Fixture fields recover; context cost, latency, and long-project recovery benefit are unproven.
Synthetic transfer decisions execute; improved real transfer decisions are unproven.

next_validation: Use paired tasks with hidden answers and identical initial working sets; vary only the mechanism contract.
Capture a redacted full trajectory and grade it independently from environment outcome.
Run randomized arm-redacted human review for reader and decision tasks.
Repeat on at least two distinct real or redacted-real projects with locked correction cost, lead time, stop/authorization violation, and outcome measures.
prohibited_public_claims: Any mechanism is more effective than native baseline.
Responsibility boundary reduces over-asking or prevents under-asking.
Operating organization or portfolio control improves throughput.
External calibration improves real transfer decisions.
